notes: Google publishes AI model cards as transparency documentation. See also: advisory/google.com (security advisories for Chrome, Android, GCP, OSV, Project Zero).

data.description: Transparency documentation for Google AI models covering capabilities, limitations, intended use, and evaluation results.
data.notes: Google publishes model cards for its AI models including Gemini, PaLM, and others. Hosted at modelcards.withgoogle.com.
